reviews.review_description: Overall a good game, though the multiplayer version is MUCH better!

The Sail Signal Player Is Awesome, It Would Be A COMPLETE GAME IF They Fixed 3 Problems :
1. When Climbing The Latter On The Ships My hands Glitch Through The Last Rung And The Post Holding The Latter On.,
2. The Floating Fortress Huge Cannon Dose Not Fire, It Can Move From Left To Right And Up And Down But There Is No Firing It.,
3. After A Battle I Get Pulled Through My Ship Into The Water And After Re-spawning On The Ship The Glitch Goes Away..
be Aware If you Play This The Main Issues(Above 2) Will Have You Buying A Ship For 10million Dollars That Is Just The One Million Warship With A Huge None Working Cannon..so don't even try for the 10 million one
Also the Other Two Issues Are Livable..i go with two stars because of the unwillingness to fix the cannon and the minor other two issues On Discord
I love the whole concept. The game is fun in every aspect except when ending an enemy. There is no blood no marks not even a noise if your making contact? How is this rated teen?

reviews.review_title: Such a great game, so full of bugs
reviews.review_description: I adore this game. I can still play it for hours, even with all the bugs... and there's a lot. It's so great to be in control of the ships and finding treasure while hearing the ocean sounds and pirate music. Hoping the bugs get worked out eventually, or there's a single player mode developed for the newer multi player version with the graphics update and captain's quarters and all the gear.
In 2025 this game still holds up as a very very strong game but it’s not as competitive as multiplayer so pls garret update this it would be cool
Its laggy
Your game is so frustrating me it glitches like crazy. It doesn’t save it doesn’t really do much of anything both your games you need to take them down fix the problem. ￼
This game was honestly annoying with multiplayer but when I noticed there was a single player it got way better. It was very fun and easy to understand the game.
I couldnt adjust my utility belt and as a result couldnt grab my sword, map, or inventory. The seven got there hands full with this one
Normal ￼Sail has a “host a private port” button￼
Please add bigger ship

How do i 
click

I don’t know what to do.  There seems to be no tutorial and all the ones on YouTube look different than what I experience.  I start off in a cave with no instructions on how to operate the boat, get resources, or even do combat.  I’ve figured out a little of it, but the one time I got into a fight I was quickly overwhelmed by numbers and enemies with guns(these were NPCs).  I don’t know how to get loot or use the fishing pole.  
Again, as the title suggests, this game has a lot of potential.  Sailing through the waters, watching islands go by and seeing ships sail is super fun! I really feel like I’m on a boat.  
A tutorial would be greatly appreciated.  If there is one, directions to it in game would be appreciated as well.  
Thanks for reading!

I have played this game for a while and noticed the changes applied to the multiplayer version, however, I have loved playing this game and can’t wait to obtain the XL ship or better known to be the floating fortress. 

Although there are bugs such as loot falling through the ground when I try to sell. I hope they are fixed in the near future, otherwise this game is amazing, beautiful, exciting, enjoyable and fun. 
Overall minus the bugs it is a 10/10 from me. To whom reads this review I hope you enjoy the game and for what it may offer.

Sail multiplayer is an amazing game with all sorts of custom weapons, ships, and accessories. It’s still buggy but I’m sure the devs will fix that in the future. 

But here’s my main concern. Sail single player is very buggy but has great potential in the future, when I played single player mode i went through the tutorial and went into my pirate hideout, then I teleported when looting and sold all my stuff and called it a day. But when I started it up again everything was gone I have no money or ship and no way to continue further and I don’t know how to fix it. I hope this gives new players and the developers the info they need. I really hope the developers continue to make great updates in the future. 

Keep up the great work!
Combat is garbage. Movements are garbage. Thank god we can get reimbursed for games lol.

reviews.review_title: Update this game it needs updating
reviews.review_description: Make it a little more exciting than the other game the online version since I noticed there was instruments on the online version and there was no instruments in this version. Heck, there’s no shotgun in that game except for the online game and possibly do a lot of things with this game, please and thank you ￼￼

Hello I love the game I was playing recroom isles of lost skulls but I wanted it to be more realistic so I went to the meta quest game store and got it because I saw it was free so I got the game and the game is good but can you please add custom swords because I’m a YouTuber and I thought it would be cool and fun if you could add a sword that has my channel profile picture on it but overall it’s a really nice game can you make it were you can swim in water bye. :-D

Tried this game out today, and it is worth getting, It's like Sea of Thieves, but in vr. It's fun to loot for treasure and fight against enemies. But for me, it was really fun to upgrade my pirate ship and set sail to a new island for treasure.

Still needs more work, like graphics, the fighting mechanism, finding treasures more easily when using the treasure detector, the shops, and much more ideas and bugs to fix.

I will be looking forward to more updates and testing them out.
Good game I haven’t even played yet and my friend told me that it’s noice

The game is really good; the only issue is with the bugs. I have a suggestion for the developer: add a button to get your boat unstuck. I got stuck between two rocks that are close to each other and couldn’t do anything, so I had to reset from my save.

This is definitely a must get for Quest owners I can literally play all day long, everything in this game is absolutely amazing and exciting it can easily make any player feel like a real pirate! 🏴‍☠️
Everyone just targets you and you get killed all the time by someone random and the game is very bugy

Hackers destroyed me and my crew by rapidly firing cannonballs, which is not possible and teleporting onto our boat and killing us. You just got three people to uninstall the game because of this and we’re never playing this game again unless you guys can fix this. GOODBYE.

developer_response.body: We're sorry you had that happened to you. We're a small team of indie devs who are all new to the capabilites of hackers and are doing our best. We hope you come play again some day but we understand your frustration.

reviews.review_description: It is a very fun game and I want multiplayer here and there a lil bug but that’s ok 😁

This game sucks and no amount of microtransaction bullcrap is going to help it. Its free so you can imagine that its only full of kids learning to swear. Super lame with no real substance. Maybe this will get deleted too.

developer_response.body: hey dude we'd love to hear more about your experience and how we could improve. We're a team of 4 just trying our best and could use the feedback. Feel free to reach out to us at support@redteam.games

reviews.review_title: Don’t belive the bad reviews! Try it!!
reviews.review_description:
After spending a few hours I think this demo proves that the game has great potential and the developers are showing that they intend to listen to the community to create the best game they can.
The art and design of the islands are great. There is still a lot of work to be done on AI but the core mechanics of the game are solid and fun. Sure it's limited and with many bugs, but come on it's a FREE demo !! The atmosphere and the music are just perfect! Great job devs keep up the good work!!!
Can't wait for the full game.

reviews.review_title: So much potential, not much too complain
reviews.review_description:
This game has incredible potential, and I downloaded it when there was quite litterally nothing  expect one island and basic mechanics and it has come so far

All the complaints others are throwing out are, and should be expected, that’s how games are developed and I’m truly exited for the full game

I feel like this game is really good for a free demo. I have fun playing it except I can’t seem to buy a new ship. I’ve seen people go to the main island and press a button to level up their ship but my button isn’t there. Can anyone tell me how to upgrade it?
I am on oculus quest 1 and whenever I try to leave the water fall at the beginning of the game it doesn't work and crashes don't know if it does that for anyone else but it is really annoying

developer_response.body: We're working on fixing this. Sorry about that

reviews.review_description:
1. The characters have a girl voice when you kill them

2. There’s no ships to buy

3. No multiplayer

4. There’s too many enemy boats

5. There’s nothing else to do besides break boxes and get money

————————————-
What there should be: 

1. Bosses when people get over 100k gold

2. More islands

3. Multiplayer lobby’s 

4. Being able to raid enemy ships for loot

5. A storyline 

——————-
Bugs right now:

1. Falling through the map on islands 

2. Enemy’s spawning every 10 seconds

developer_response.body:
These are awesome suggestions! Most are already in the works! If you're not already in the discord please join up so we can get your help fixing the bugs!

Edit:
Please try the latest update and see if we've improved on these bugs :)

reviews.review_description:
Been here since the beginning. 
This game has come a long way!
All it needs now is multiplayer.

I played your game for a few hours and I found a decent amount of bugs that I had to share. I understand that the game is still in early development and bugs are expected I love the idea of sea of thieves VR and have very high hopes for the future of SAIL. 

Hear is some bugs I found 

•sword enemies hit box is invisible I can only hit them with a sword the pistol, sniper does not affect them no matter where I shoot

•I purchase a gold treasure chest voyage and the key disappeared, it seems to always happen on the one island that looks red on the map, this happened three times i was able to get the other two chest every time but the gold chest key seems to be very glitchy with one island.

•Important Bug-  I got all three chest’s in a voyage and then returned to the hideout when I tried to go back out I was not allowed to collect coin, more specific I broke boxes no coin I did another gold treasure chest voyage and the chest gave no coin as well so I went to the main menu and logged back in boxes still gave no coin so I had to quit the app. I started it up and everything was working fine but every time I did all three treasure chest returned to hideout and go out again the second time always stops you from making coin it’s very consistent I tested it 5 times and it happened 5 times in a row

•I have over a million coin and it says I’m a privateer 

 
•can you fix the sword enemies from teleporting to different island I noticed that the amount of ai that are aggressive at you will teleport to any island that you flee to and sometimes all the friends will just appear on a small islands out of nowhere 

•I’m not sure how your supposed to set off the bomb your able to buy I tried shooting it with a pistol,sniper,tomahawk, nothing would set it off I tried picking it up and pressed every button nothing worked 

•while moving on the ship you cannot use your sniper it just flys out of your hands it comes back but it’s very glitchy while moving on the ship 



Those were the most memorable bugs from my last play session I hope that you guys keep on this game it’s such a great idea this reminds me of the early days of sot 

I’m sure you guys have people pitching ideas all the time but I gotta just throw these out there

Future possibilities?!

•interactive wildlife/wildlife enemies (giant squid,sharks,whales,lizards,birds,monkeys, etc)


•to heal instead of health potions fruit and meat from animals would give more of an island vibe 

•customizations for players pirate 

•different types of voyages 


Your game is going to be a masterpiece one day I can feel it I said it already and I’m going to say it again I love this idea and I hope you and your crew doesn’t stop on this game ! I will definitely do an updated review next time we have a new update.
I can’t figure out how to actually set sail/go out to the open sea

reviews.review_title: Wished for a game like this for, forever
reviews.review_description: Ever since I was 11I was addicted to this game called “Sea of Thieves” and when I got into VR I wished and looked for a VR version of it, and this game looks exactly like sea of thieves early stages. I have a feeling that this game will turn out well.

reviews.review_title: this is getting me a bit annoyed
reviews.review_description: So hi I have no idea how to ride the boats if anyone that knows how pls tell me, thanks!

developer_response.body:
Hey Jax! 

Get in the boat and at the back there's a crank with the label anchor. Reel that up and you'll start going. :)

reviews.review_description: What game are these high score reviewers playing?? Don’t bother. It is so far off from being anything substantial. Reminds me of 13 year olds class project.

developer_response.body: hehehehe guess who got funding to make a full feature game with their 13 year old class project?  :) (Keep those expectations high!!! Because I intend to meet them)

2:  let us swim not die 

thank you 
this game is still great 4 star game
